description_long: This lantern features a robust cylindrical body with a teal-green metallic frame and a central glass enclosure. The glass is slightly tinted and protected by a crisscrossed metal wire guard, which adds both structural integrity and a decorative touch. Two prominent orange side grips are attached to the frame, likely for handling or mounting. The top of the lantern has a large, sturdy loop handle, making it easy to carry or hang. The base is wide and stable, suggesting it can be placed securely on flat surfaces. The overall design is utilitarian with subtle decorative elements, suitable for outdoor urban environments.
description: A teal-green cylindrical lantern with a tinted glass enclosure, orange side grips, and a protective wire guard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wire guard pattern, orange side grips, and the central glass enclosure clearly.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated, revealing more of the left orange grip and the curvature of the frame.
description_view_2: Back view with the wire guard and glass enclosure still visible, but the orange grips are less prominent.
description_view_3: Right side view highlighting the right orange grip and the protective wire structure.
